quality.no_additives: No added preservatives, flavorings, or chemical additives

delivery.description: We organize the export process to keep procurement predictable: from batch confirmation to a shipment-ready container with transparent timelines and documentation.
delivery.overlay_text: Complete documentation package for international requirements

terms.delivery_20_days: Delivery time from 20 days after payment

confirmation.title: Confirmation
confirmation.description: We lock specification, volume, and timeline in a commercial offer.

preparation.title: Preparation
preparation.description: We prepare the batch, packaging, and complete export documents.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.description: We dispatch cargo in the agreed transport window and share status updates.

hero.description: We create products with verified quality: from raw material selection and gentle drying to safe packaging and international logistics. A production site of more than 1 hectare and a team of 200+ specialists allow us to deliver consistent results for every client.

export.label: Global Export
export.title: Reliable partner in international markets
export.description: We supply dried fruits to Europe and the USA while maintaining one quality standard for every contract. Transparent communication, stable volumes, and predictable delivery timelines build long-term partner trust.

natural_origin.title: Natural Origin
natural_origin.description: Raw materials from trusted farmers with traceable sourcing and incoming quality control.

stable_timing.title: Stable Delivery Timelines
stable_timing.description: Containers are shipped within agreed windows so you can plan sales and warehouse operations accurately.

weight_control.title: Weight and Sorting Control
weight_control.description: Every batch goes through calibration, sorting, and final quality verification before packaging.

quality.label: Quality & Standards
quality.description: Sunny Fruit production is aligned with HACCP and ISO 9001 requirements. We document each batch path, keep process parameters stable, and verify safety before every shipment.

seasonal_raw.title: Current Season Raw Materials
seasonal_raw.description: We use fresh harvest and record the origin of each batch.

gentle_processing.title: Gentle Processing
gentle_processing.description: We keep a stable temperature profile to preserve the product's natural taste.

lab_check.title: Laboratory Verification
lab_check.description: We check moisture and key safety indicators before packaging.

reliable_logistics.title: Reliable Logistics
reliable_logistics.description: We prepare cargo for international shipping according to destination country requirements.

raw_selection.title: Raw Selection
raw_selection.description: Incoming quality control and visual sorting of supplies.

production.title: Production
production.description: Drying, calibration, and careful processing according to standardized process maps.

final_control.title: Final Control
final_control.description: Batch parameter verification, labeling, and export document preparation.

quality.result_text: Predictable quality in every shipment, transparent documentation, and confidence for long-term procurement.

cta.label: Trusted Export Partner
cta.title: Ready to discuss your next dried fruit shipment?
cta.description: We will prepare a specification, align volumes, and offer optimal shipping timelines for your market.

brand.description: Premium processing and export of dried fruits from Uzbekistan with a focus on stable quality, safety, and long-term partnership.
